name: samwha
description: Samwha Electric is Korea's premier capacitor manufacturer with over 65 years of expertise in aluminum electrolytic capacitors, film capacitors, and energy storage solutions. Serving global markets with ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 certified manufacturing.
longDescription: Founded in 1956, Samwha Electric has grown to become Korea's largest and most respected capacitor manufacturer. With state-of-the-art production facilities and comprehensive R&D capabilities, Samwha produces over 2 billion capacitors annually for automotive, industrial, consumer electronics, and renewable energy applications. The company's aluminum electrolytic capacitors are renowned for their high reliability, long lifetime, and competitive pricing. Samwha holds IATF 16949 automotive certification and serves major OEMs worldwide. Their product portfolio includes radial, snap-in, screw terminal, and solid polymer aluminum electrolytic capacitors, as well as film capacitors for power electronics. With a commitment to quality and innovation, Samwha continues to expand its global presence through strategic partnerships with authorized distributors.

seoTitle: Samwha Capacitor Distributor | Aluminum Electrolytic, Polymer, Film Capacitors
seoDescription: Authorized Samwha distributor. Korea's leading capacitor manufacturer. Aluminum electrolytic, solid polymer, and film capacitors for automotive, industrial, and consumer applications.

faqs.question: Is your company an authorized Samwha distributor?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are an authorized distributor of Samwha Electric products. We maintain direct relationships with Samwha's sales and technical teams, ensuring genuine products with full traceability and manufacturer warranty. Our authorization covers the complete Samwha product portfolio including aluminum electrolytic capacitors, solid polymer capacitors, and film capacitors. We stock popular series for immediate delivery and can support custom specifications for high-volume projects. All products are sourced directly from Samwha's ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 certified manufacturing facilities in Korea.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for a copy of our distributor authorization certificate and to discuss your specific capacitor requirements.

faqs.question: What makes Samwha capacitors competitive in the global market?
faqs.answer: Samwha offers several competitive advantages: 1) Cost-effectiveness - Korean manufacturing provides excellent quality-to-price ratio compared to Japanese and European brands, 2) Automotive expertise - IATF 16949 certification and extensive AEC-Q200 qualified portfolio, 3) High reliability - Proven track record with major automotive and industrial OEMs, 4) Fast delivery - Strategic inventory positioning for Asian markets, 5) Technical support - Strong FAE team and application engineering support, 6) Vertical integration - In-house aluminum foil production ensures quality control and cost optimization. Samwha capacitors are particularly strong in long-life electrolytics and high-temperature applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request samples and compare performance data for your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Samwha capacitor for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Samwha capacitor involves several key parameters: 1) Capacitance and voltage rating - Choose based on your circuit requirements with appropriate derating, 2) Temperature range - Standard series rated to 85°C, high-temperature series to 105°C or 125°C, 3) Lifetime requirements - Calculate using Arrhenius equation based on operating temperature, 4) Ripple current - Ensure the capacitor can handle the RMS ripple current in your application, 5) Physical size - Consider diameter, height, and mounting style (radial, snap-in, screw), 6) Certification needs - AEC-Q200 for automotive, standard industrial grade for other applications. Our FAE team can provide detailed selection guidance and lifetime calculations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our online capacitor calculator or contact our FAE team for application-specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Samwha capacitors?
faqs.answer: Lead times vary by product type and volume: Standard radial lead aluminum electrolytic capacitors are typically available from stock or 4-6 weeks production lead time. Snap-in and screw terminal types usually require 6-8 weeks. Solid polymer capacitors have 8-10 week lead times due to specialized manufacturing processes. Film capacitors are typically 6-8 weeks. For automotive-qualified parts, add 2-4 weeks for additional testing and documentation. We maintain strategic inventory of popular Samwha series for immediate delivery. For large volume production orders, we offer scheduled deliveries and VMI programs to optimize your supply chain. Contact our sales team for current lead times.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and to discuss inventory programs for your production needs.

faqs.question: Does Samwha provide AEC-Q200 qualified capacitors for automotive applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Samwha offers a comprehensive range of AEC-Q200 qualified aluminum electrolytic capacitors specifically designed for automotive electronics. These capacitors undergo rigorous testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, vibration, and humidity resistance per AEC-Q200 standards. Key automotive series include high-temperature types rated to 125°C and 150°C, long-life series for under-hood applications, and low-ESR types for decoupling applications. Samwha's automotive capacitors are used in ECUs, LED drivers, onboard chargers, battery management systems, and ADAS applications. Full PPAP documentation is available for automotive production. All automotive-grade capacitors are manufactured in IATF 16949 certified facilities with full lot traceability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request our automotive capacitor selection guide and qualification reports for your automotive projects.

faqs.question: What technical support does Samwha offer through distributors?
faqs.answer: As an authorized Samwha distributor, we provide comprehensive technical support including: 1) Capacitor selection assistance based on your specifications and application requirements, 2) Spice models and simulation support for circuit design, 3) Thermal modeling and lifetime calculations using Arrhenius equations, 4) Application notes and design guides for various use cases, 5) Sample kits and evaluation boards for prototype testing, 6) On-site technical support for critical projects, 7) Failure analysis support in collaboration with Samwha engineering, 8) Custom specification development for high-volume applications. Our FAE team has extensive experience with Samwha products and can provide guidance on optimal capacitor selection for reliability and cost-effectiveness.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical support team to connect with an FAE specializing in your application area.

faqs.question: How does Samwha ensure product quality and reliability?
faqs.answer: Samwha maintains rigorous quality control throughout the manufacturing process: 1) Raw material control - In-house production of aluminum foil ensures consistent quality, 2) Process control - Automated production lines with SPC monitoring, 3) 100% electrical testing - All capacitors undergo capacitance, ESR, and leakage current testing, 4) Environmental testing - Temperature cycling, humidity, and life testing per industry standards, 5) Reliability data - Weibull analysis and accelerated life testing data available, 6) Traceability - Complete lot traceability from raw materials to finished product, 7) Certifications - ISO 9001, IATF 16949, and AEC-Q200 compliance. Samwha's defect rates are among the lowest in the industry, making their capacitors suitable for high-reliability applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request quality certifications and reliability data for your quality management system.
